_doc: Supply-chain origins (P16.1). Every economic item has an ORIGIN: a RAW material (gathered/farmed/hunted from a source tile by a profession, with a tool) or a CRAFTED good (made from inputs at a workstation by a profession + skill level). Mining/woodcutting/fishing raws are DERIVED from gathering.json and crafted goods from recipes.json; this file adds the profession layer, the workstations, and the farmed/foraged/hunted raws that live outside gathering.json. Loaded + merged by engine/production.py.
